import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Constants
COLORS = ['r', 'g', 'b']

def task_func(df, group_col, value_col):
    if not df[value_col].dtype == np.number:
        raise TypeError("Value column contains non-numeric values.")

    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    groups = df[group_col].unique()
    group_count = len(groups)
    bar_count = df.shape[0]

    if bar_count > (len(COLORS)*group_count):
        raise ValueError("The number of data points exceeds the available colors.")

    for group, color in zip(groups, COLORS):
        data_for_group = df[df[group_col] == group][value_col].tolist()
        errors_for_group = np.std(data_for_group) if len(data_for_group) > 1 else 0
        ax.bar(range(len(data_for_group)), data_for_group, yerr=errors_for_group, label=group, color=color)

    ax.set_xlabel(group_col)
    ax.set_ylabel(value_col)
    title = f"Bar chart of {value_col} by {group_col}"
    ax.legend()

    return ax, title
